title: elasis hirsuta
intro: Elasis hirsuta, also known as hairy elasis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of elasis hirsuta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antiviral and antifungal activities. In herbal preparations, elasis hirsuta can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional remedies for its various health benefits.
